name: Lullaby Devoured
descriptionTemplate:
At the start of battle, gain {Counter} equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's DEF.
Whenever {Death Resistance} triggers, increase {Embryo Fusion} by +[StateArg3] and gain 2 turns of "Cradle": Shield gained from and HP recovered by all Awakeners +[StateArg2]%. Remove 1 stack of "Cradle" at turn end. If the current Realm is {Caro}, {Embryo Fusion} +[StateArg3] after triggering {Death Resistance}.
lore:
She is called the cursed child born with death, an unblessed daughter. 
The "cradle" belonging to her and her sister has just shattered, and brilliant light spills out from the cracks, taking root on the ground. In an instant, green grass withers, flowers fade, and even distant trees and fish in the lake lose their vitality, becoming soulless husks. 
Her family gasps in horror and hurriedly relocates all other cradles. She struggles to break free from the cradle, like a chick hatching from an egg, but her outstretched hands are repulsed with disgust, and all she sees are faces of contempt. 
Only her sister, who was born that night and matured earlier than her, will forever hold her. She sings lullabies with a voice like a spirit bird. 
"Sleep, sleep, my dear sister; 
Sleep, sleep, sweet dreams will surely come." 

She should not exist, and if she did not, her shimmering sister would not be stained by the shadow of sin. 
My poor sister, she always thinks that you bear the cost of existence you shouldn't have to shoulder. 
My poor sister, she always thinks that as long as the sister can do it, she will surely give her all for you. 
"Sleep, sleep, my dear sister; 
Sleep, sleep, I love you even in dreams."
